summary: Scoped backend-only admin sensitive access audit slice satisfies the frozen sprint contract. V008 creates a safe append-only audit table, the current admin bearer-token boundary records covered code-status and default-denied admin attempts, focused and full backend Maven checks pass with explicit JDK 21, docs are synchronized, OpenAPI/generated-client no-op is justified, and human gates remain open.

acceptance.criterion: Append-only Flyway migration creates admin access audit log without editing prior migrations.
acceptance.evidence: apps/api/src/main/resources/db/migration/V008__admin_access_audit_log.sql and Testcontainers Flyway run in focused/full Maven checks.

acceptance.criterion: Covered admin access attempts create one safe audit row each.
acceptance.evidence: AdminBearerTokenAuthenticationFilter records after Spring Security/controller handling; AdminCodeStatusControllerIT covers success, missing/invalid token, validation/not-found and default-denied paths.

acceptance.criterion: Successful code-status read logs method, action, permission, UUID scope, status 200, SUCCESS and non-secret admin principal ref.
Missing/invalid token attempts log unauthenticated safe outcomes without token material.
Default-denied admin paths log coarse denied outcomes without request/response bodies.
acceptance.evidence: logsDefaultDeniedAdminPathWithCoarseRouteOnly and route classifier stores /api/v1/admin/** for unknown admin paths.

acceptance.criterion: Known-route validation and not-found outcomes are logged when covered.
Existing code-status auth and privacy-safe response contract are preserved.
acceptance.evidence: Existing AdminCodeStatusControllerIT response/auth assertions still pass; no controller/DTO diff found.

acceptance.criterion: Audit rows do not persist raw bearer token, raw invite code, activation subject ref, employee contact PII, request/response body, legal body or full query string.
acceptance.evidence: V008 safe columns only, AdminAccessAuditService inserts only method/route/action/permission/scope/status/outcome/principal metadata, route check rejects query strings, and guardrail tests/scans pass.

acceptance.criterion: No User, OrgMembership, subscription, seat, pro_user or premium shortcut is introduced.
acceptance.evidence: Changed production backend files are limited to admin audit/security/config and contain no access-model shortcuts.
No endpoint or DTO changed; packages/api-client has no diff.

acceptance.criterion: Docs-sync and Mermaid audit flow are present.
acceptance.evidence: docs/architecture/access-and-subscriptions.md documents the audited bearer-token boundary and includes the audit log in the Mermaid flow; evidence.md also includes a sequence diagram.

acceptance.criterion: Human gates remain open and full MVP-03/MVP stage are not closed.
acceptance.evidence: status.json keeps human_gates_open=true, active sprint awaiting verifier before this artifact, MVP-03 complete=false and production admin policy gate open.

checks_run.notes: Focused admin IT passed; Flyway validated and applied 8 migrations through V008.
Full backend Maven verification passed with Testcontainers and Flyway V008.

checks_run.command: production guardrail scan over V008 and changed backend audit/security/config files

checks_run.notes: packages/api-client has no diff; no controller/DTO source changed.

checks_reviewed_not_rerun.reason: Root command evidence is recorded in sprint evidence; fresh verifier reran focused AdminCodeStatusControllerIT and full apps/api Maven verify, which is sufficient for this backend/schema/API slice.
Reviewed from evidence; not rerun to avoid overrun after independent backend Maven verify passed.
Reviewed from evidence; generated Next churn is assessed separately below.

ui_or_browser_evidence.reason: This sprint is backend-only and does not change employee/admin UI behavior or source. No browser screenshot is required.

generated_tooling_churn.reason: The tracked file flipped from .next/dev/types/routes.d.ts to .next/types/routes.d.ts during the recorded Next production build. This is disclosed in evidence, has no admin UI/source behavior impact, and does not affect the backend audit acceptance criteria.

openapi_generated_client.reason: No endpoint, DTO or response contract changed; packages/api-client has no diff.

docs_sync.notes: The canonical access doc now records the current audited bearer-token admin boundary and keeps future admin identity/RBAC human-gated.
